family: p3b_tail_enriched (cross-family: brep_solids + geometry_kernel + entities + symbol_tables_dictionaries + constraints_associativity)
_provenance: Handles are REAL and harvested, never guessed: measure/reachable_fixtures/enriched_manifest.json (built by tools/build_enriched_fixture.py -- a sequential sanctioned-probe chain over ops already RUNNABLE in reachable_matrix_20260714). solid_a=19191 (wedge, + ARIADNE_P3B_TAIL xdata + extension dict), solid_b=191A7 (coincident wedge), line_1=191BB (1,2,0)-(11,12,0), line_2=191CF (0,0,0)-(10,0,0), circle_1=191E3 (r=3.5), assoc_action=19237, preexisting INSERT=11995, preexisting MTEXT=1199B, material Global=EE (inspect.material.enumerate, runs/p3b_tail/mat_enum). The fragment-level 'dwg' key routes sweep probes of THESE ops to the enriched seed (probe_reachability._merge_reachable_fixtures).

inspect.brep.from_entity.evidence: m08d_handlers.inc L926-937,943-946 (m08dFindHandle 'handle' -> m08dBindBrep; bind success returns source_class); handle=solid_a per enriched_manifest.json

compute.brep.point_containment.evidence: m08d_handlers.inc L926-937,1064-1068 (m08dFindNamedPoint 'point' -- {x,y,z} object per m08dFindNamedPoint/parsePointFromObject); handle=solid_a (2.0x1.5x3.5 wedge); any well-formed point exercises the containment computation

compute.brep.line_containment.evidence: m08d_handlers.inc L926-937,1083-1088 (m08dFindNamedPoint 'a'/'b'); handle=solid_a; the line crosses the wedge's neighborhood

compute.solid3d.interference.evidence: m08d_handlers.inc L736 (m08dOpenEntity+AcDb3dSolid::cast on 'handle_a'/'handle_b'); solid_a/solid_b are coincident wedges (guaranteed overlap) per enriched_manifest.json

modify.entity.solid3d.boolean.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1877 (m08gFindHandle 'handle', jsonFindString 'other_handle', 'bool_op' default unite); both AcDb3dSolid per enriched_manifest.json

modify.curve.split.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1946 (m08gFindHandle 'handle', 'params' double array); line_1 built at (1,2,0)-(11,12,0) by build_enriched_fixture.py => length sqrt(200)=14.1421, param 7.0710678 = midpoint (KNOWN geometry, not guessed)

modify.curve.to_spline.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc (modify.curve.to_spline: only 'handle' read via m08gFindHandle); line_1 per enriched_manifest.json

modify.entity.xdata.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1673 (m08gFindHandle 'handle', jsonFindString 'app_name', 'values' array of {code,value}; codes 1000 string / 1040 numeric per the in-handler 1000-1071 validation table); handle=line_2

inspect.entity.get_xdata.evidence: m08e_handlers.inc m08eHandleEntityXdata ('handle' via jsonFindString -> resolveHandle -> xData()); solid_a carries ARIADNE_P3B_TAIL xdata (verified in graph IR by build_enriched_fixture.py harvest step) => non-empty, non-degenerate read

inspect.object.ext_dict.evidence: m08c_handlers.inc (m08cFindHandleArg 'handle'/'object_handle' -> extensionDictionary()); solid_a's extension dictionary created by chain step e06 (write.object.create_ext_dict, status ok) => non-empty read

inspect.material.properties.evidence: materials_read.inc materialsReadHandleProperties ('handle' via jsonFindString -> AcDbMaterial under ACAD_MATERIAL NOD); handle=Global material harvested live via inspect.material.enumerate (runs/p3b_tail/mat_enum: entries ByBlock=ED ByLayer=EC Global=EE)

inspect.entity.annoscale.contexts.evidence: annoscale_read.inc annoscaleReadEntityContexts ('handle' via jsonFindString -> AcDbObjectContextInterface); handle=preexisting MTEXT 1199B per enriched_manifest.json; if the MTEXT is non-annotative an empty context list is the honest result (op may legitimately stay REACHABLE)

write.layerstate.restore.evidence: w6_layerstate_handlers.inc (w6FindNameArg 'name'; lsm.hasLayerState gate); state saved by chain step e08 (write.layerstate.save, status ok) per enriched_manifest.json

write.layerstate.delete.evidence: w6_layerstate_handlers.inc (w6FindNameArg 'name'; lsm.hasLayerState gate); same saved state as write.layerstate.restore (each probe stages its own copy, so restore/delete cannot interfere)

write.entity.attribute.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L876 ('blockref_handle' fallback m08gFindHandle; 'tag'/'text'/'height'/'position' reads in-branch); 11995 = pre-existing AcDbBlockReference harvested from the graph IR (enriched_manifest.json)

write.entity.blockref.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1152 ('name' -> pBT->getAt; 'position' via m08gPoint); name = the block definition the pre-existing INSERT 11995 references (graph IR harvest) -- a REAL insertable block table record; non-ASCII name doubles as a UTF-8 name-path probe

write.entity.minsert.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1152 shared branch + L1184 ('columns'/'rows'/'col_spacing'/'row_spacing' via jsonFindNumber); same harvested block name as write.entity.blockref

write.entity.region.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1100-1149 ('curves':[<handle>...] -> resolveHandle + acdbOpenObject -> AcDbRegion::createFromCurves); 191E3 = circle_1 (closed planar curve) per enriched_manifest.json

write.entity.rasterimage.evidence: m08g_handlers.inc L1497-1528 ('image_path' non-empty -> AcDbRasterImageDef source/active filename); tests/fixtures/probe_image.bmp is a real 70-byte 2x2 24-bit BMP committed to the repo; NOTE path is repo-relative -- the promotion runner absolutizes it (a bare sweep may honestly fail the valid leg if accoreconsole's CWD differs)

define.constraint.addGeometry.evidence: m08kc_handlers.inc L313 (m08kcFindHandle 'target_handle'/'handle' -> m08kcAddGeometryForHandle -> m08kcMakeFullSubentPath; 'group_handle' optional, auto-created); target=line_1

define.perssubentid.resolve.evidence: m08kc_handlers.inc L864-905 (m08kcFindHandle 'target_handle'/'handle' -> subentPtr enumeration of real edges/vertices); target=line_1

needs_state.reason: requires 'dimension_handle' of a resident AcDbDimension (m08kc_handlers.inc L403-417); NO dimension entity exists in native_sample.dwg or the enriched seed, and no write.entity.dimension.* create op exists in the registry to bake one -- stays honestly REACHABLE until a dimension-bearing fixture DWG exists.

chain-created AcDbAssocAction (19237, define.assocaction.create status ok) does NOT survive the DWG save/reload round-trip in the headless host -- on reopen the handle no longer casts to AcDbAssocAction (proxy/culled).
